name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or change

---

**The need**
What are you trying to do that the app doesn't support?

**Proposed behaviour**
What should happen. Keep the north-star in mind (low floor, high ceiling — nobody hindered; see
`DESIGN.md`).

**Which family (if routing)**
Sketch-faithful (foot/cycle/scenic) or get-me-there? See `PLAN-MATCH` §9 / `PLAN-ROUTING`.

**Relevant plan doc**
Which `PLAN-*.md` this touches, if any.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything you ruled out and why.
